title: Fact Sheet - ABC Supply
text:
# Fact Sheet

[Home](https://www.abcsupply.com/) » [Media Center](https://www.abcsupply.com/media-center/) » Fact Sheet

ABC Supply Co. Inc. is the largest wholesale distributor of roofing and other select exterior and interior building products in North America.

**Headquarters:** National Support Center

One ABC Parkway  
Beloit, WI 53511-4466  
Phone: (608) 362-7777

**Website:** [www.abcsupply.com](https://www.abcsupply.com/)

**Founded:** 1982

**Locations:** Over 1000 locations across the U.S. and Canada

**Associates:** More than 20,000 associates

**Products and Services:** ABC Supply locations offer a wide assortment of exterior building products, including roofing materials, siding, gutters, windows and doors, and renewable energy products, as well as accessories and tools.

Through its subsidiary [L&W Supply](https://lwsupply.com/) Corporation, over 270 locations offer an array of interior products, including drywall, ceiling tile, steel framing and other building supplies. The company also operates over 35 locations through its [Town & Country Industries](https://www.tc-alum.com/) division — which specializes in pool and patio, hurricane and industrial building products — and more than 20 locations in Alberta, British Columbia, and Ontario, Canada, operating as [ABC Supply Co.](https://www.abcsupply.ca/) and distributing exterior building materials.

To make it even easier for contractors to do business with ABC Supply and manage their businesses on the go, myABCsupply and ABC Connect give customers 24/7 access to ABC Supply’s products and pricing.

With myABCsupply, customers can request measurement services, order materials online, track deliveries (including delivery photos) and manage their billing. Contractors can access their accounts at [myABCsupply.com](http://www.myabcsupply.com/) or download the ABC Supply app for their iOS or Android devices.

The [ABC Connect](https://www.abcsupply.com/contractor-center/abc-connect/) program allows customer to connect to ABC Supply with tools that they use every day, including the [ABC API](https://apidocs.abcsupply.com/) and integrations with industry-leading software.

The ABC Supply catalog gives professional contractors easy access to the tools, equipment and accessories they need to get the job done. The catalog contains more than 6,000 high-quality tools and specialty items, from hand and power tools to fasteners, caulks, sealants, ventilation, safety equipment, apparel and accessories. Products are available at any ABC Supply location.

ABC Supply’s [Freedom Programs](https://www.abcsupply.com/contractor-center/freedom-programs/) are a portfolio of products and services designed to help contractors build their businesses. A variety of marketing and business-building tools save contractors time and make it easier for them to get the word out about their businesses.

Contractors can also find resources to improve their businesses on [ABC Supply’s blog](https://www.abcsupply.com/news-events/) and [LinkedIn page](https://www.linkedin.com/company/abc-supply/) .

**Customers:** Approximately 99 percent of ABC Supply’s sales are to professionals, including builders, remodeling contractors and specialized contractors, such as roofers and drywall contractors.

**Company Ownership:** ABC Supply was founded by Ken and Diane Hendricks and remains privately held.

**Company Honors:** ABC Supply is a 19-time Gallup Exceptional Workplace Award winner and two-time recipient of Glassdoor’s Employees’ Choice Award for Best Places to Work. The company also received the National Association of Wholesaler-Distributors’ 2025 NAW Distributors Deliver Award.

**Company Sponsorships:** One of ABC Supply’s seven Core Values is Give Back. The company fulfills its responsibility to give back to the communities its branches serve through Homes For Our Troops and Make-A-Wish <sup>®</sup> corporate sponsorships. Locally, branch associates support their communities by providing their time, talents and financial support to countless organizations.

**Executives:**

* **Mike Jost:** President and Chief Operating Officer
* **Jim Anderson:** Chief Financial Officer
* **Lisa Indgjer:** Executive Vice President of Associate Services and Human Resources
* **Karl W. Leo:** Chief Legal Officer
* **Jonathan Shepard:** President of ABC Supply’s Branch Operations
* **Tony Vaden:** Chief Information Officer
* **Matt Belcher:** Southwest Region Vice President
* **Matt Cooper:** West Region Vice President
* **Tom Kuchan:** Northeast Region Vice President
* **Joe Small:** Midwest Region Vice President
* **Scott Toumbleston:** Mid-South Region Vice President
* **Lloyd Hamilton:** Southeast Region Vice President
* **Frank Marcoccio:** President of L&W Supply
